new_value: {"notes":"Completed after signed-oracle dependency closed. Harness independently reconstructs every vector field boundary, invokes Python serialization/rejection, requires exact Rust exit/category/all parsed fields, validates exact live simulator bytes, fails CI on missing prerequisites, and checks generated vector freshness including untracked recreations. Canonical set includes unsigned address modes, elided mode, valid signed plaintext oracle, and both encrypted negative forms. Exact CI class with LICHEN_RUN_CROSS_IMPL=1: 2 passed, 0 skipped. Multiple independent reviews converged after signed oracle landed; unrelated workflow false-green paths tracked by 2auf.36."}
